g.text: The Scissors: End-Device Memory Demand vs Supply (2024 — 2028)

text.style: fill: #555555; font: 10.5px 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Conservative AI fits; agentic AI does not — deficit opens around 2027 on a median 16–20 GB flagship.

text.style: fill: #777777; font: 7.8px 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Annual growth (median flagship): LPDDR capacity ~17%/yr · traditional apps ~18%/yr · conservative AI ~37%/yr · aggressive AI demand ~45%/yr from 2026.

text.style: fill: #777777; font: 7.8px 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Caveat: values from 2026.5 onward are projections.
